title: Probiotics: The $77 Billion Gut Illusion
description: The probiotic market is worth $70 billion and growing. The clinical evidence supporting it — for the conditions most people take it for — is, by the AGA's own guidelines, insufficient to recommend. This piece follows the money, the manipulated trials, the regulatory vacuum, and the specific, narrow conditions where probiotics actually work — and asks how we got this far from the science.
